text: Repository hygiene PR cleanup for SCPN-QUANTUM-CONTROL completed: the compliant manual dependency update passed CI, all four Dependabot PRs were closed or auto-closed as superseded, the five remaining failed PR workflow runs and one superseded cancelled CI run were deleted after closure, and low-risk lint/security drift was addressed by aligning CI tool pins and pinning the runtime requirements mirror to Python 3.10-compatible versions observed in green CI.
